notes: v0.3.11: Dual camera vertical stack layout. Video clips now record as 960x1080 with self-view mirrored on top and peer video on bottom — Snapchat-style side-by-side, ready to post to Instagram feed (1:1 or 4:5) or Reels/TikTok (pads to 9:16). No more picture-in-picture, no letterbox, no stretch — both cameras get full 960x540 cells. Thin divider line between them, jamsync watermark still rotates through the 4 corners every 5 seconds. Bitrate bumped to 1.5 Mbps to match the higher pixel count; 60-second duration cap stays put. Safe to re-enable hardware-accelerated decoding in VLC — v0.3.10 small-file approach eliminated the crash class.
